title: Day 48 Lesson 3 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these sentences:

Sentence 1 - どう　したんですか。= What's wrong?

Sentence 2 - からだの　ちょうしが　わるいんです。= I don't feel well.

Sentence 3 - じつは　おとといから　ねつが　さがらないんです。= Actually, I have had a fever since the day before yesterday and it won't go down.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard. Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
